title: scabiosa argentea subsp. ucranica
intro: Scabiosa argentea subsp. ucranica, also known as the Ucrainian scabiosa or field scabious, is a perennial plant species of the genus Scabiosa, characterized by its white or pale pink flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Scabiosa argentea subsp. ucranica include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in natural remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
